SEARCH
Package simpaths.experiment

Class SimPathsObserver

java.lang.Object
microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationManager
microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationCollectorManager
microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationObserverManager
simpaths.experiment.SimPathsObserver
All Implemented Interfaces:
microsim.engine.SimulationCollectorManager, microsim.engine.SimulationManager, microsim.engine.SimulationObserverManager, microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.ILongSource
public class SimPathsObserver extends microsim.engine.AbstractSimulationObserverManager implements microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.ILongSource
CLASS TO MANAGE OBSERVER OF SIMULATED OUTPUT
